name: NEW_TARGETPAIRS_BY_FUNCTION_2024
description: New target pairs by functional category in 2024. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (f:Functional_of_Target {name: $functional_of_target})<-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)
MATCH (tp)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WITH tp, min(y.year) AS first_year
WHERE first_year = $year
RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, first_year
ORDER BY target_pair
LIMIT 10

examples: Among target pairs related to the Non-Oncology/Allergy category, which ones were first disclosed in 2024?
Among target pairs related to the Metabolic_Endocrine_Signaling_Target category, which ones were first disclosed in 2024?
Among target pairs related to the Developmental_Signaling_Pathway_Target category, which ones were first disclosed in 2024?
